title: Oden Sails with Roger Toward the World’s Truth
description: On pages 5–8, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Oden, Momonosuke, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Orochi as Oden travels with Roger, reaches the truth of the world, and returns to a Wano already being poisoned by Orochi and Kaido.
scene: Oden travels with Roger, reaches the truth of the world, and returns to a Wano already being poisoned by Orochi and Kaido.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Muhahaha!! I will never do that!! in fact...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You don't have the authority of a shown!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: kyo kyo....

dialogue.speaker: Oden
dialogue.text: Oh... there you are, oden...

dialogue.speaker: Momonosuke
dialogue.text: Eh?! Father?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Why are you all...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Kyokyo Kyokyo!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: All these fools, starting with the Daimyo...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They all fell for this old Hag's lies!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: That's me!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: By disgusting herself with the power of the "Clone clone fruit"...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She managed to fool the entire country and enabled me to take on the position of "shogun"!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And who cares what the real sukiyaki thought?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You bastard, what did you do to my father?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Did he really die from a terminal illness?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That day, a crowd formed in front of the palace to celebrate the return of the Kozuki clan...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Lord Oden!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: When suddenly, two poisoned arrows were shot into the crowd from an unknown direction

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: gyaah!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The victims collapsed and, after violently vomiting blood, lost their lives

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: kyah!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: a medic, quick!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The people hastily took shelter in their homes...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And in the cloudy Sky over the capital, they saw a giant dragon

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He had a unique childhood, but became damiyo of kuri...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He headed out to sea and met the best pirates in the world...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: After returning to his country, he was still strong...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The first time I was in the middle of the day, and I was wondering if I was a little more

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Kozuki Oden, who knew no enemy of his caliber!! He should have become...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The Saviour of his people, who suffered the oppressive forces of an evil power.... however...

dialogue.speaker: Oden
dialogue.text: A few hours later... Kozuki Oden...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: presented himself naked in front of Orochi's residence...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Making a fool out of himself

dialogue.speaker: Orochi
dialogue.text: Orochi's underlings and the beast pirates laughed

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The return of Kozuki often, the legitimate heir of Wano...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Was the last ray of hope for the country....

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Kozuki Oden, the idiot Lord of Kuri:

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: This is the big man going home...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: But the country was betrayed and...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Here!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Nice!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The desperation of the people turned into anger

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: After acting like a clown for some pieces of gold

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: fell on his butt in front of a snake:

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: What is he doing?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Don't laugh at his jokes & whoopsie!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Once a week, open showed up at the Capital...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: It's him again...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: acting like a fool in front of the palace, trying to make a living...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No matter if it rained, stormed or snowed

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Lord Oden, please!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Every week, I get paid for dancing naked, and that is my business

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Don't lie to us!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What did you say to Orochi?!?! why are you acting like this?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even the people of Kuri, who have always believed in you, can't take this any longer!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The rumors about the events in the capital eventually reached Kuri

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: It's the idiot Lord!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Stop acting like him... like the disappointment he is!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Instead of bowing to Orochi, you should have committed seppuku, like a warrior!!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Oden, Roger, and the Final Voyage storyline with 59 dialogue beats. Oden travels with Roger, reaches the truth of the world, and returns to a Wano already being poisoned by Orochi and Kaido.
